MOTION Of Deft Fidelity Transfer Company And Heidi Sadowski To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment And For Leave To File X-Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-28-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John L. Fitzgerald, ESq. of PINNACLE LAW GROUP, LLP 394-5700 for defendants FIDELITY TRANSFER COMPANY and HEIDI SADOWSKI moving party
Peter Mallon, Esq. of NIESAR & DIAMOND LLP 882-5300 for Plaintiffs and opposing party

ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Grant motion to set aside default and vacate default judgment. Mr. Mallon's request for sanctions is awarded only for the taking of the default and the default judgment. No sanctions awarded for opposing this motion. The Request for Sanctions was continued to JANUARY 16, 2002. Mr. Mallon's supplemental request to be filed by January 2, 2002; opposition by January 9, 2002. No reply. Courtesy copies to be delivered to this Court on the date of filing. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
